name: Berry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the berries and place them in a 2-quart baking dish, sprinkling with sugar and rosewater.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Quickly stir in buttermilk and melted butter (2 tablespoons). Mix gently.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the batter on top of the sweetened berries to form a design of rounds.
4. Mix together honey, melted butter (1 tablespoon), and lemon juice. Pour over the berries and biscuits.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes. Serve warm with rich cream.
